action.description:
Introduced by Senators Habush Sinykin, Carpenter, Larson, Keyeski, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Hesselbein, Wirch and Dassler-Alfheim; 
cosponsored by Representatives Miresse, Tenorio, Clancy, Madison, Palmeri, Udell, Arney, Snodgrass, Taylor, Cruz, DeSanto, Joers, Stroud, Hong, Phelps, Goodwin, DeSmidt, Roe, Emerson, Stubbs, Moore Omokunde, Sinicki, Fitzgerald, Brown, Andraca, Johnson, Anderson and Mursau
